dialogos.texto_en: (I was bewildered by the two Itsukis in the\nexhibition corner, so I tried to change targets to\nother Itsukis, but the result was equally dismal...)
(Meanwhile, in my confusion,\nthe quintuplets finished touring the entire building\nand gathered again in the entrance hall.)
There were so many interesting things to see! We were\nable to learn about Okinawa's history and culture\nthat we couldn't find in textbooks.
The exhibition on the Ryukyu Kingdom era was also great.\nThe vibrant colors unique to Okinawa\nare a traditional feature.
The art museum was also wonderful!\nIf we had more time,\nwe could have participated in the workshops too.
Yes, there were many interesting things\nlike a 'sanshin' instrument experience,\nand making 'shisa' lion-dog crafts.
...Indeed.
(*sigh*\n My head is already hurting from their confusing\n methods, and yet they look so joyful.)
(But seriously, this is really tough.)
(To think they would even mimic other quintuplets\n other than Itsuki during their quintuplets game...)
(I can't tell if they forgot\n they were mimicking Itsuki,\n or if they were mimicking another sister.)
(At first, I thought it would be fine\n to talk together while they're acting...\n but that was really naive.)
(Are they intentionally trying to make me notice,\n or is it the slightly obvious trap\n that makes it worse?)
(...But then again, I'm the one who's reacting to it!)
(Damn, it's already troublesome enough\n that they're all playing as Itsuki,\n and now they're setting traps on top of that!)
(However, I can't just let them keep doing\n whatever they want.)
(Fine then. If that's the case,\n I'll need to be more thorough!)
...Alright.\nI need a plan first.
Are you alright? You seem tired.
Huh? No, I'm fine. I was just getting motivated.
Teehee!\nThat's exactly what I expect from you.
Hmph, I'll definitely figure this out. Just wait.
(It's not a joke that our year and a half together\n would be denied by you guys yourselves.)
To figure this out...
Both of you.\nIt's getting late, shall we discuss dinner now?
Ah! Yes!\nThat's right.\nI think there's a cafe inside the hotel.
Instead of eating here, let's go back to Kokusai dori.\nIt's close to the hotel!
There are many delicious-looking restaurants\non Kokusai dori... H-how should we decide?
In this case, why don't we go on a food tour?\nI'm sure it'll be fun!
Uesugi-kun, is there something you want to try?
(Insisting on a food tour, isn't that Itsuki?\n No, that's too obvious.\n It could be a fake...)
Uesugi-kun?
What is it?\nDon't stare at me like that.
Mmm...
Um, your gaze is a little scary, you know?
...That so?\nWell, don't worry about me.
Even if you say that...
Even you must be hungry, Uesugi-kun.\nLet's hurry and go!
Yeah.
Itsuki? What's wrong?
Oh, no, it's nothing.\nLet's hurry too.
